flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 40% at University of Arkansas Grantham vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.2k vs 5.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Arkansas Grantham fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5k → 2.8k).

flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Arkansas Grantham fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (18.7% → 16.9%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at University of Arkansas Grantham are 136% above 6-year earnings ($26.9k → $63.5k).
